title: Faulty Radix Sort with Incorrect Comparison

statement.markdown: Given a large array of integers, write a function to sort the array using radix sort. The function should take an array of integers as input and return the sorted array.
statement.inputFormat: Input will be a list of integers.
statement.notes: Radix sort is a non-comparative integer sorting algorithm that sorts data with integer keys by grouping keys by the individual digits which share the same significant position and value.

examples.explanation: Sort the array of integers using radix sort
Sort the array of integers using radix sort

hints.text: Understand the problem and the requirements of radix sort.
Identify the error in the given code and correct it.

editorial.title: Radix Sort Editorial
editorial.intuition: Radix sort is a non-comparative integer sorting algorithm that sorts data with integer keys by grouping keys by the individual digits which share the same significant position and value.
editorial.optimalSolution: The optimal solution is to use radix sort with the correct comparison and grouping.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The proof of correctness is that the sorted array should have the elements in the correct order.
commonMistakes: Not using the correct comparison in radix sort
